attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; converts from lead-out duties to opportunistic sprint when designated sprinter fails to hold position.
team_tactics: Functions as lead-out man for designated sprinter (Modolo), but team coordination shows fragility with disconnection issues at critical moments.
terrain_preference: Sprint stages where lead-out work transitions to personal opportunities; struggles when team cohesion breaks down in finale.
vulnerability: Dependent on team sprint structure; exposed when lead-out plans collapse and forced into reactive rather than planned sprint positioning.
key_patterns: Transitions from lead-out to personal sprint when primary sprinter disconnects from train.
BikeExchange sprint coordination failures create unplanned opportunities rather than structured finishes.
Strong enough individually to contest sprints but lacks independent positioning framework.
form_trajectory: neutral: showed individual strength to contest sprint opportunistically but within dysfunctional team context
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
